title: Pocket Change
description: Adds coin items to bring capitalism to your server.
body:
Adds 6 coin types and a purse to hold them.

-Copper Coin (x1 Copper Ingot)\
-Iron Coin (x9 Copper Coins)\
-Gold Coin (x9 Iron Coins)\
-Emerald Coin (x9 Gold Coins)\
-Diamond Coin (x9 Emerald Coins)\
-Netherite Coin (x1 Diamond Coin + x1 Netherite Ingot)

-Coin Purse (x4 Wool + x1 Copper Coin)
